intro: TOTOTECH is an Australian-owned technology consulting and advisory practice, built on a foundation of enterprise architecture, technology strategy and hands-on delivery experience.
body: We work with organisations navigating complex technology environments — universities, government agencies, and corporate enterprises — helping executive teams make confident, well-governed technology decisions.

Our experience spans enterprise architecture, technology strategy, business analysis and program delivery, giving us a rare combination of strategic perspective and delivery credibility. We've led architecture practices, shaped multi-year transformation roadmaps, and stayed in the room to see programs through to outcomes.

A particular depth of experience in higher education and smart buildings means we understand the unique complexity of campus environments — from teaching spaces and research infrastructure to occupancy analytics and digital signage — as well as the governance rigour expected in large, multi-stakeholder organisations.
We remain vendor-independent by design. Every recommendation is shaped by what will genuinely move your organisation forward, not by partnership arrangements or product incentives.

expertise.title: Enterprise Architecture
expertise.description: Business, application, information and technology architecture practice leadership.

expertise.title: Technology Strategy
expertise.description: Digital roadmaps, investment prioritisation and executive advisory.

expertise.title: Business Analysis
expertise.description: Requirements, process mapping and current/future state analysis.

expertise.title: Program Delivery
expertise.description: PMO, business readiness and hands-on implementation leadership.

expertise.title: Transformation
expertise.description: Operating model design and technology modernisation programs.

expertise.title: Higher Education
expertise.description: University technology strategy and campus transformation.

expertise.title: Smart Buildings
expertise.description: AV, IoT and digital infrastructure for modern workplaces and campuses.

expertise.title: Technology Governance
expertise.description: Architecture review, governance frameworks and risk management.

timeline.title: Practice founded
timeline.description: TOTOTECH established to bring independent, executive-grade technology advisory to Australian organisations.

timeline.title: Higher education focus
timeline.description: Expanded into university and campus technology strategy, building deep sector expertise.

timeline.title: Smart buildings practice
timeline.description: Extended capability into smart building, AV and IoT advisory for modern campuses and workplaces.

timeline.title: Enterprise transformation
timeline.description: Scaled into large enterprise architecture reviews and multi-year transformation programs.

timeline.title: Broader enterprise reach
timeline.description: Extended advisory reach across government, corporate and infrastructure sectors nationally.
